description: Declarative specification of the local heartbeat run schedule. Does not implement scheduling, cron, deployment, or external publication.

STRICT.description: Set STRICT=1 to treat warnings as failures.

schedules.label: Daily Local Heartbeat
schedules.name: Daily Local Heartbeat
schedules.description: Full manual local heartbeat run with dev blog and two insight sources. Run from repo root via make heartbeat.

DATE.description: Date for the heartbeat run (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

DEV_BLOG_SOURCE.description: Path to dev blog Markdown source. Omit to skip dev blog lane.

INSIGHT_SOURCE.description: Path to insight Markdown source (repeatable). Omit to skip insight lane.

FORCE.description: Set FORCE=1 to overwrite existing artifacts. Omit to fail if artifacts exist.

publication.note: Publication (email, Substack, website, external sync) is deferred to later tasks.

notes: This is a manual local schedule only. No cron, deployment, or external automation.
Run from the repo root. All child scripts are invoked as subprocesses.
Beta Release Sentinel always runs. Dev blog and insight lanes require source arguments.

caveats: Passing the review gate confirms lanes ran and artifacts exist; it is not release approval.
This manifest is a specification, not an active schedule. Scheduling is deferred.
No external publication is performed by any heartbeat script.
